title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Nami, Luffy as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did he just try to dodge that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't think you get it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You tried to stand. So I prevented you from standing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You tried to throw a punch with your left hand. So I hit your left shoulder.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you tried to throw a punch with your right hand. So I hit your right shoulder. HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as a result, you've been reduced to an idiot that can only grow frustrated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what it means to be read like a book.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: attacks have will- power behind them.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't just flail about wildly, luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was right... while infrequently, he's managing to see the future, just like me!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 26 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
